feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Marketing Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Marketing Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud: One Click Unsubscribe button not visible in emails
entry.content:
Hello Community!

My company is getting ready for the google deliverability updates. According to these updates, it is required for us to enable a "one click unsubscribe button" to our emails.

We have followed the steps detailed under "Automatic Unsubscribe for Emails (List Unsubscribe)" and we have also added an email address for unsubscribing based on the links here:

  • Unsubscribe for Emails and Text Messages | SAP Help Portal 
  • Opting-Out and Unsubscribing by Email | SAP Help Portal

In the Sender Profiles in the options for the header we have opt for Email Address for unsubscribing. Since Sinch Email 365 is our ESP, we have used the email address that is presetted and recommended (unsubscribe@eusmtp.email.sdi.sinch.com). See also picture attached.

Even though, when we tested receiving an email, no unsubscribe button or any link in the email body or header of the email is visible.

So my question is:

Is there any additional step we must configure? I thought only the email address was necessary for the unsubscribe button to be visible, but are we missing something?

Thanks in advance,

Rebeca.

entry.title: more than one email address with opt-in - which email will receive the email campaign?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am wondering what the logic is in the SAP Marketing Cloud for email campaigns if a contact has more than one email address with an opt-in. Which of the email addresses is the campaign sent to?

I was assuming that it is the email with the most recent opt-in, but it is not. 

Is there a logic or is it just random?

Best regards,

Valeska

entry.title: Update Custom CBO from BAdi or Custom logic using
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I want to create new record to custom CBO from SAP Marketing cloud BAdi 

I have tried following this URL but I am getting an error " 403 Unified Connectivity: Forbidden" 

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/update-custom-cbo-from-badi/qaq-p/12385756

Communication Scenario

Communication Arrangement

Communication System

In the below code while executing line DATA(response3) = lo_client->send( request2 ).

I am getting error " 403 Unified Connectivity: Forbidden"

I am not sure where I have to maintain HTTP user and password , it is already maintained in the communication arragment.

Please could you help me.

Thanks.


" Step:1-* Check if communication arrangement is available and active
TRY.
CHECK cl_ble_http_client=>is_service_available(
communication_scenario = 'YY1_INT_HTTP'
outbound_service = 'YY1_INT_HTTP_REST'
) = abap_true.
CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx_error_http_service).
"for All errors
lv_MSGV1 = lx_error_http_service->status_code.
lv_MSGV2 = lx_error_http_service->status_description.
CONCATENATE lv_MSGV1 lv_MSGV2 INTO Data(lv_return_message).
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).
ENDTRY.

lv_return_message = 'HTTP Service Check Sucessfull'.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).
TRY.

" Step:2-* Create HTTP client for the Outbound Service
DATA(lo_client) = cl_ble_http_client=>create(
communication_scenario = 'YY1_INT_HTTP'
outbound_service = 'YY1_INT_HTTP_REST'
).
CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx_error_OS_creation).
"for All errors
lv_MSGV1 = lx_error_OS_creation->status_code.
lv_MSGV2 = lx_error_OS_creation->status_description.
CONCATENATE lv_MSGV1 lv_MSGV2 INTO lv_return_message.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).
ENDTRY.

lv_return_message = 'Create HTTP request is successful'.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).


" Step:3-* Create HTTP request and Fetch CSRF toker
TRY.
DATA(request) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).
DATA lv_s2p TYPE string VALUE '/YY1_PRODUCT_MASTER_HELPER_CDS/YY1_PRODUCT_MASTER_HELPER?$top=1 '.
request->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'X-CSRF-TOKEN' value = 'FETCH' ).
request->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'Accept' value = 'application/json' ).
request->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'Content_Type' value = 'application/json' ).
request->set_method( 'GET' )->set_resource_extension( lv_s2p ).

cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( 'Before reading CSEF token' ).

DATA(response1) = lo_client->send( request ).
DATA(lv_csrf1) = response1->get_header_parameter( 'x-csrf-token' ).

cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( 'After reading CSEF token' ).

CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx_error_fetch_csrf).
"for All errors
lv_MSGV1 = lx_error_fetch_csrf->status_code.
lv_MSGV2 = lx_error_fetch_csrf->status_description.
CONCATENATE lv_MSGV1 lv_MSGV2 INTO lv_return_message.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).
ENDTRY.

lv_return_message = 'Fetch CSRF toker is successful'.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).


" Step:4- * Concatenate json format body
TRY.
IF lv_csrf1 IS NOT INITIAL.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_csrf1 ).
DATA ls_double_quot TYPE string VALUE '"'.
DATA ls_single_comm TYPE string VALUE ','.
DATA ls_double_coll TYPE string VALUE ':'.
DATA ls_open_brack TYPE string VALUE '{'.
DATA ls_clos_brack TYPE string VALUE '}'.
DATA ls_single_dot TYPE string VALUE '.'.

DATA ls_product_id TYPE string VALUE '"ProductID"'.
DATA ls_Status TYPE string VALUE '"Status"'.
DATA Remarks TYPE string VALUE '"SAP_Description"'.

data(lst_status) = 'Not Existing'.
data(lst_remarks) = 'from Revise Interaction Before Creation BAdi'.

* { "PRODUCT_ID": "98765", "STATUS": "Not Existing", "SAP_Description": "from Revise Interaction Before Creation BAdi" }.
CONCATENATE ls_open_brack ls_product_id ls_double_coll ls_double_quot lv_product_id ls_double_quot ls_single_comm INTO Data(lv3_product_id).
CONCATENATE ls_Status ls_double_coll ls_double_quot lst_status ls_double_quot ls_single_comm INTO Data(lv3_status).
CONCATENATE Remarks ls_double_coll ls_double_quot lst_remarks ls_double_quot ls_clos_brack INTO Data(lv3_remarks).

CONCATENATE lv3_product_id lv3_status lv3_remarks INTO Data(lv_payloadp).
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_payloadp ).

" Step:6- * Calling service
DATA(request2) = cl_ble_http_request=>create( ).
DATA lv_s3p TYPE string VALUE 'YY1_PRODUCT_MASTER_HELPER_CDS/YY1_PRODUCT_MASTER_HELPER'.
request2->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'x-csrf-token' value = lv_csrf1 ).
request2->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'Accept' value = 'application/json' ).
request2->set_header_parameter( EXPORTING name = 'Content_Type' value = 'application/json' ).
request2->set_method( 'POST' )->set_resource_extension( lv_s3p ).
request2->set_body( lv_payloadp ).

cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( 'Before sending Payload' ).
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_payloadp ).

DATA(response3) = lo_client->send( request2 ).
DATA(lv_xml) = response3->get_body( ).
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_xml ).

lv_return_message = 'Final Service Call is successful'.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).

ENDIF ."IF lv_csrf1 IS NOT INITIAL.
CATCH cx_ble_http_exception INTO DATA(lx_error_Call_Service).
"for All errors
lv_MSGV1 = lx_error_Call_Service->status_code.
lv_MSGV2 = lx_error_Call_Service->status_description.
CONCATENATE lv_MSGV1 lv_MSGV2 INTO lv_return_message.
cl_ble_trace_writer=>write_info_message( lv_return_message ).

RETURN.
ENDTRY.

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Landing Page Favicon
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have a requirement to add our brand logo to the browser tab (i.e., using favicon) for the landing pages hosted by SAP.  As it's not possible edit the <link> tag of the pages, we're unable to add the logo.  Does anyone have a workaround?  I have raised a support ticket - as I beleive this is something that needs doing on our behalf - but was advised to raise the request within the community. SAP Marketing Cloud 

Thank you in advance!

Regards

Brad

entry.title: Campaign Approval Workflow restart after rejection
entry.content:
I have implemented a Campaign Approval workflow for our client. The workflow itself works correctly. When the request is rejected the campaign status sets to "In Preparation" as it is described in https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_MARKETING_CLOUD/b88f770e4b7c4ecead5477e7a6c7b8f7/a4e2abf0b4db41ad95c1b11f002f0c7f.html

If the editor again clicks on the "Submit for Approval" button the workflow is not started again, but the campaign status is directly set to "Released" and the editor could start the campaign without an approval.

Why does the campaign approval workflow not restart? In my opinion this is a general business use case. What is the recommendation to deal with the campaign after a rejection?

entry.title: SMC Content Studio UI
entry.content:
Hi All,

Good day!

Just checking with you all on how I can revert back the Content Studio UI for emails. Currently one of my emails look like this:

And we want to revert back to this view where it's not really zoomed in:

Thanks in advance!

Marc

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud - Usage of BAdI: Create and Update Permissions for Additional Marketing Areas
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

within Marketing Cloud we use the BAdI "Create and Update Permissions for Additional Marketing Areas " which is unfortunately deprecated.

Usecase is that Permission can be generated for example through Form with a local Marketing Area but the Persmission should be stored and centralized/global one.

Is there any other way to achieve this as we don't know how long this BAdI will be available?

Additional question:

We would prefer to create also the Communication Categories / Subscriptions only for the Marketing Area. But this way it cannot be used in local campaigns. Is there any way to achieve this?

Thanks & best regards,

Aaron

SAP Marketing Cloud

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud Training
entry.content:
I am Muthukumar and working as SEO specialist. I would like to learn SAP Marketing cloud. Is that right course for me to upgrade skills or switch domain? 

Can anyone suggest me to clear this doubt?

entry.title: sap marketing cloud agreement transfer from Sinch to SAP
entry.content:
Dear community,

our customer has received an email from sinch with the information that the agreement will be transferred from Sinch to SAP.

Unfortunately, I could not found any information on whether this requires changes in the Marketing Cloud or not.

Has anybody more information on this issue?

 

Kind regards

Robert

entry.title: Upload Pre OptIn for Marketing Permission (MKT_PERM_OPTIN_PRE) does not work
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 

we would like to import the interaction type "Pre OptIn for Marketing Permission (MKT_PERM_OPTIN_PRE)" to trigger a DOI email .

But we get the following error message: 



Can someone help us with this? 

Thanks in advance!
Katharina

entry.title: Connection to FTP Server as data file base for assets (pictures)
entry.content:
Dear all,

does anyone from you established a interface between a file server (FTP server) directly to Marketing Cloud or with middleware CPI?

The expected result will be that in content studio the assets from FTP server are available. Is that possible or is this a wish which can never be implemented?

I know about a standard connector for Cellum (CMS system) but we doesn´t want to license a new programm.

Thanks for your answers,

Lukas

entry.title: I can release a target group which is not approved
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I can release a target group which is not approved - how can i avoid this? 

Kind Regards

Katharina

entry.title: How is it possible to stract Notes from a SAP Form in SAP Marketing Cloud?
entry.content:
Dear Experts, 


Our client has created a form in which there is a text entry. It contains a query.
Following the manual, it is possible to link that interaction (Note) as an Appointment in the Interactions tab of the Contact Person app.

However, we want to see all the inputs from the field in a report, in an aggregated form.

Form with free text- create appoitnment interactionInteractions tabWe have investigated and it is possible to create a target group with the people who have filled out that form (interaction type = appointment), but we cannot see the aggregated responses.

Where can you see the aggregated results of the notes?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Content Studio - Form Performance Reporting
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have published multiple SAP Forms which have come a key contributor to our SMC database growth.  An issue we do have in their use however is that we're unable to easily report on landing page performance.  Currently we need to access each form and select the Analytics tab (see below).  We managed to find a Analytical Query that provides the total count of submissions by form ID and Description, but our requirement is to also show the New Contacts count, being that this is a key metric in which we monitor.  Any suggestions in how we could create a CDS and Custom Analytical Query that delivers the New Contact count in addition to Total Submissions would be greatly appreciated.

Regards

Bradley

entry.title: Replicating Opt-Outs from external webforms to Marketing Cloud (via CPI Integration)
entry.content:
Hello Community,

We have a question/issue in concern of replicating Opt-Outs from external webforms to SAP Marketing Cloud through CPI:

Background:
In our SMC multiple contacts exist with the same mail-address. Currently we are still using SAP MC Forms for the Opting-Out-process. If an Opt-Out for Email is submitted via these forms the optout will be saved in all of the contacts that have the corresponding mail-address based on the technical origin email.

Due to some technical problems in past, we want to be independent on these SMC Opt-Out forms, so that’s why we created an Iflow in CPI. The purpose was that an Opt-Out form now also can be created externally. The provider of this form only needs to send the necessary data to CPI like:
- Mail-address
- Marketing Area
- And a trigger which is responsible for the Opt-Out

Due to our Iflow in CPI the Opt-Out permission is saved in the contact in SMC with the corresponding mail address. This was already successfully tested from our side.

But:
If multiple contacts exist with the same mail-address we receive the following message in SMC import monitor:
“Multiple contacts found for ID EMAIL …”, see screenshot:


Now our question is: Do you know how we can solve this issue? We have to ensure, that this Opt-Out integration also works properly in case of multiple contacts with same mail-address.

Additional information: We are using the following API for this integration:
API_MKT_CONTACT

Thank you and kind regards
Sören

entry.title: Campaign auto restart after error - adjust timing
entry.content:
Hi,

I sometimes have campaigns that show an error in the logs such as:

Package "189" started at "28.05.2024, 07:43:24 (CET)" was finished with a fatal error.

When this happens, the campaign automatically restarts after roughly 30 minutes.

Is there some way to influence that 30 minute timeframe? We'd like to make this shorter. 

This is on an onprem SAP Marketing system.

entry.title: SAP Marketing Cloud email campaign email opened but no link clicked, behavior triggers
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to setup an email campaign in SAP Marketing Cloud and I want to setup a follow-up email if a customer opened an email but did not click any links (after a period of time)

How would I go about this? Does the click through action, with the No branch, imply that the customer opened the email but did not click any links?

Kind Regards,

Felix

entry.title: How to send Emails with Attachments in SAP Marketing Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement, where the Business want to send the Bulk Emails to the Customers with Attachment's in SAP Marketing Cloud. I did not find any option to assign attachments, Can you please suggest is this out of box functionality or not.

 

Regards,

Hemanth.B

entry.title: Execute custom logic at permission import
entry.content:
Our business is uploading permission data via the "Data File Load" app. We noticed that in some cases the contact IDs contain upper case characters, however, all IDs in the SAP Marketing Cloud are stored in lower case. It seems as this is an issue and the Marketing Cloud is case-sensitive in this case as the import monitor shows an error "No contact found for ID SAP_HYBRIS_CONSUMER...". Of course, the business can make sure to always upload the IDs in lower case. However, if possible, I would like to implement some custom logic to make the contact IDs always lower case before the further execution takes place. I tried several BadIs but it seems as none of them is executed at permission upload - at least the custom logic trace is not logging anything. 

  • CUAN_IMPORT_IC
  • CUAN_FIND_INTERACTION_CONTACT
  • CUAN_IMPORT_IA_4_IC
  • CUAN_IA_REVISE_FOR_IMPORT

Did someone already implement custom logic at permission upload and can point me to the right direction? 

Best
Christian

entry.title: sap-outbound-id in a different url parameter
entry.content:
Hi,

In content studio, when you toggle "Outbound ID for Consuming App", this appends the url parameter sap-outbound-id .

You can also use your own "name of link parameter" with "value of link parameter" to add url parameters with the name of your choice.

I would require a link parameter named "cf1" with the sap-outbound-id as its value.

How can I achieve this? I do not seem to find the outbound id in the list of fields for the "value of link parameter"...

Context is that I want to do a survey with Pointerpro. Pointerpro can recognize url parameters, but they need to be in parameters called cf1, cf2, cf3, ... . The url parameter "sap-outbound-id" is not recognized by Pointerpro. 

I looked in the custom logic "Adjust Hyperlink Parameters While Sending Emails" but there it seems mostly about the google analytics parameters, and I also don't see at first sigh a variable that contains the outbound id, but I'm not sure about that.

 

Thanks for your advice,

Kr

Joyca
